query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as mapping_count
FROM mappings m
JOIN plos p ON m.ploId = p.id
WHERE p.programId = 34;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 582RunNG3RGjvE7.85f193ee7630 --database DF8hhJErzDeZBFGeijL5fW --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as mapping_count
FROM mappings m
JOIN plos p ON m.ploId = p.id
WHERE p.programId = 34;
